metadata.title: Don't Be Cruel
metadata.lyrics:
[00:06.56] You know I can be found
[00:09.37] Sitting home all alone
[00:12.12] If you can't come around
[00:14.94] At least, please, telephone
[00:17.03] Don't be cruel
[00:19.88] To a heart that's true
[00:23.41] Baby, if I made you mad
[00:26.35] For something I might have said
[00:29.38] Please, let's forget my past
[00:32.03] The future looks bright ahead
[00:34.19] Don't be cruel
[00:36.85] To a heart that's true
[00:40.46] I don't want no other love
[00:43.31] Baby, it's still you I'm thinking of, mm
[00:49.18] Don't stop thinking of me
[00:51.97] Don't make me feel this way
[00:54.80] Come on over here and love me
[00:57.42] You know what I want you to say
[00:59.60] Don't be cruel
[01:02.12] To a heart that's true
[01:05.99] Why should we be apart?
[01:08.76] I really love you, baby, 'cross my heart
[01:14.62] A-let's walk up to the preacher
[01:17.24] And let us say, "I do"
[01:20.16] Then you'll know you'll have me
[01:23.01] And I'll know that I'll have you
[01:25.12] Don't be cruel
[01:27.84] To a heart that's true
[01:31.41] I don't want no other love
[01:34.44] Oh, baby, it's still you I'm thinking of
[01:39.62] Don't be cruel (ooh-ooh-ooh)
[01:42.08] To a heart that's true
[01:45.31] Don't be cruel (ooh-ooh-ooh)
[01:47.63] To a heart that's true
[01:51.23] I don't want no other love
[01:54.33] Oh, baby, it's still you I'm thinking of
[01:57.41]
